What is football?: Football is a sport played between two teams of eleven players attempting to score goals.
How many players are on a football team?: A football team has eleven players on the field.
How long is a football match?: A standard football match lasts ninety minutes plus added time.
What is a goal in football?: A goal is scored when the ball completely crosses the goal line between the posts.
What is offside in football?: Offside is a rule that prevents players from gaining an unfair positional advantage.
What is a penalty kick?: A penalty kick is awarded after certain fouls inside the penalty area.
What is a free kick?: A free kick is awarded after a foul is committed.
What is a corner kick?: A corner kick is awarded when the defending team last touches the ball before it crosses the goal line.
What is a throw-in?: A throw-in restarts play when the ball leaves the field over the touchline.
What is added time?: Added time compensates for stoppages during the match.
What is VAR?: VAR stands for Video Assistant Referee.
What is FIFA?: FIFA is the international governing body of football.
What is UEFA?: UEFA is the governing body of European football.
What is the FIFA World Cup?: The FIFA World Cup is the most prestigious international football tournament.
How often is the FIFA World Cup held?: The FIFA World Cup is held every four years.
What is the UEFA Champions League?: The UEFA Champions League is Europe's top club football competition.
What is the Premier League?: The Premier League is the top football division in England.
What is La Liga?: La Liga is the top football division in Spain.
What is Serie A?: Serie A is the top football division in Italy.
What is the Bundesliga?: The Bundesliga is the top football division in Germany.
What is Ligue 1?: Ligue 1 is the top football division in France.
What is the Copa Libertadores?: The Copa Libertadores is South America's top club football competition.
What is the Copa America?: The Copa America is the main international football tournament in South America.
What is the UEFA European Championship?: The UEFA European Championship is the main national team tournament in Europe.
What is a hat-trick?: A hat-trick occurs when a player scores three goals in one match.
What is a clean sheet?: A clean sheet means a team conceded no goals in a match.
What is a striker?: A striker is a player whose primary role is scoring goals.
What is a midfielder?: A midfielder plays between defense and attack.
What is a defender?: A defender helps prevent the opposing team from scoring.
What is a goalkeeper?: A goalkeeper protects the goal and can use their hands inside the penalty area.
What is a captain in football?: The captain is the leader of the team on the field.
What is a yellow card?: A yellow card is a caution given by the referee.
What is a red card?: A red card sends a player off the field.
What is extra time?: Extra time consists of two additional fifteen-minute periods.
What is a penalty shootout?: A penalty shootout decides a match when teams remain tied after extra time.
What is a derby?: A derby is a match between rival teams from the same area.
What is a transfer in football?: A transfer occurs when a player moves from one club to another.
What is a loan in football?: A loan allows a player to temporarily play for another club.
What is a football club?: A football club is an organization that manages a football team.
What is promotion in football?: Promotion allows a team to move to a higher division.
What is relegation in football?: Relegation moves a team to a lower division.
Who is Pelé?: Pelé was a Brazilian football legend and three-time World Cup winner.
Who is Diego Maradona?: Diego Maradona was an Argentine football legend.
Who is Lionel Messi?: Lionel Messi is an Argentine football player considered one of the greatest in history.
Who is Cristiano Ronaldo?: Cristiano Ronaldo is a Portuguese football player considered one of the greatest in history.

What is Grêmio?: Grêmio is a Brazilian football club based in Porto Alegre.

What is the Ballon d'Or?: The Ballon d'Or is an annual award given to the world's best football player.
What is the Golden Boot?: The Golden Boot is awarded to the top goal scorer in a competition.
What is a football formation?: A football formation describes how players are positioned on the field.
What is a 4-4-2 formation?: A 4-4-2 formation uses four defenders, four midfielders, and two forwards.
What is a 4-3-3 formation?: A 4-3-3 formation uses four defenders, three midfielders, and three forwards.
What is tiki-taka?: Tiki-taka is a style of play based on short passing and movement.
What is total football?: Total football is a tactical system where players can interchange positions.
What is pressing in football?: Pressing is a tactic where players aggressively try to regain possession.
What is possession football?: Possession football focuses on controlling the ball for long periods.
What is a counterattack?: A counterattack is a quick offensive move after winning possession.
What is a bicycle kick?: A bicycle kick is an acrobatic shot made with the player's back facing the goal.
What is a nutmeg in football?: A nutmeg occurs when the ball is played through an opponent's legs.
What is a volley in football?: A volley is a shot taken before the ball touches the ground.
What is a football manager?: A football manager is responsible for coaching and tactical decisions.
What is a football academy?: A football academy develops young players.
What is a friendly match?: A friendly match is a non-competitive football game.
What is a rivalry in football?: A rivalry is a long-standing competitive relationship between clubs or national teams.
Who is Michael Jordan?: Michael Jordan is widely considered one of the greatest basketball players of all time.
Who is LeBron James?: LeBron James is one of the most accomplished basketball players in NBA history.
Who is Kobe Bryant?: Kobe Bryant was a legendary NBA player who spent his entire career with the Los Angeles Lakers.
What is the NBA?: The NBA is the premier professional basketball league in North America.
What is basketball?: Basketball is a sport where two teams try to score by shooting a ball through a hoop.
How many players are on a basketball tea: A basketball team has five players on the court.
What is a slam dunk?: A slam dunk is a shot where a player forcefully puts the ball through the basket.
What is a three-pointer?: A three-pointer is a shot made from beyond the three-point line.

What is pole position?: Pole position is the first starting position on the grid.
What is NASCAR?: NASCAR is a popular stock car racing competition in the United States.
What is volleyball?: Volleyball is a team sport played over a net.
How many players are on a volleyball tea: A volleyball team has six players on the court.
What is a spike in volleyball?: A spike is a powerful attacking shot.
What is a block in volleyball?: A block is a defensive move to stop an opponent's attack.
What is beach volleyball?: Beach volleyball is a version of volleyball played on sand.
What is baseball?: Baseball is a bat-and-ball sport played between two teams.
What is a home run?: A home run occurs when a batter hits the ball out of the playing field.
What is MLB?: MLB is the highest level of professional baseball in North America.
What is a strikeout?: A strikeout occurs when a batter receives three strikes.
What is softball?: Softball is a variation of baseball played with a larger ball.
What is golf?: Golf is a sport where players hit a ball into holes using clubs.
Who is Tiger Woods?: Tiger Woods is one of the most successful golfers in history.
What is a hole-in-one?: A hole-in-one occurs when a golfer sinks the ball in one shot.
What is the Masters Tournament?: The Masters is one of golf's most prestigious tournaments.
What is boxing?: Boxing is a combat sport where two fighters punch each other within a ring.
Who is Muhammad Ali?: Muhammad Ali is one of the most famous boxers in history.
Who is Mike Tyson?: Mike Tyson is a former heavyweight boxing champion.
What is a knockout?: A knockout occurs when a fighter cannot continue after being struck.

What is WWE?: WWE is a professional wrestling entertainment company.
Who is John Cena?: John Cena is one of WWE's most famous wrestlers.
Who is The Undertaker?: The Undertaker is a legendary WWE wrestler.
What are the Olympic Games?: The Olympic Games are international sporting events held every four years.
What is the Paralympics?: The Paralympics are international games for athletes with disabilities.
What is swimming?: Swimming is a sport involving racing in water.

What is a relay race?: A relay race involves team members taking turns completing parts of a race.
